refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each operation's contribution to cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle times for load, travel, and dump phases individually and in combination under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions; verify p95 cycle time ≤ CT_target.
sub_frs: Minimize load operation time to meet cycle time target
Minimize travel operation time to meet cycle time target
Minimize dump operation time to meet cycle time target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system and bucket control for load efficiency
Implement autonomous or assisted travel path planning and speed control
Automate dump positioning and release mechanisms
selected_dp.selected_dp: Implement autonomous or assisted travel path planning and speed control

potential_sources: Load operation timing affects travel start time
Dump operation timing affects cycle completion
coupling_check.notes: DP focuses on travel phase optimization, which is logically separable but interfaces with load and dump phases via timing constraints.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site mapping and vehicle localization
Risk of suboptimal travel paths due to dynamic site conditions
Safety criticality requires fail-safe travel control
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating load and dump operation optimizations in subsequent decomposition levels to reduce cross-phase coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical vehicle systems responsible for travel path planning and speed control

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange vehicle status and travel path data with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive travel commands and path updates from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Send safety alerts related to travel operations to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but less direct control of travel operations
Primary module for travel control; high containment and low diffusion
Supports manual override and remote control; moderate containment and diffusion
Monitors safety alerts but does not implement travel control

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Travel path planning and speed control DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and enable direct control.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with Teleoperation for manual override
Safety alert integration requires robust interface with Safety Services
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and safety protocols between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services to mitigate diffusion risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR for travel phase optimization and is verifiable via cycle time measurements.

diffusion_risks: Manual override via Teleoperation may increase diffusion
Safety alert propagation requires reliable interface
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for travel control DP, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring travel times and monitoring safety alerts through defined interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of travel control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose load and dump operations in next level to complete cycle time optimization.
Strengthen interface definitions between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services.

decision.justification: The current level decomposition and assignments are sound for the travel phase, but full cycle time optimization requires further decomposition of load and dump operations.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize load operation time to meet cycle time target
Minimize dump operation time to meet cycle time target

revise.why: To refine and decompose the remaining cycle phases for comprehensive coverage of the cycle time KPI.

assumptions: Site mapping and vehicle localization are sufficiently accurate
Safety protocols are enforced at interfaces
open_risks: Dynamic site conditions affecting travel path optimization
Interface complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements for load and dump phases
Interface performance and safety alert reliability tests
